📱 Syncing between devices?
SLYGHT stores data on this device only.
To sync: Export on one device → Import on another.
🔒 All data is stored locally on this device. Nothing is sent to any server.
📱 SLYGHT data is stored on this device only.
To sync between devices: export on one device, import on another.

Afterpay / Klarna / Zip — auto-stops after the last payment so you don't need to manually delete.

Mark as paid
Bills tracked as paid early
These bills are flagged as paid in your tracking, but money hasn't moved yet (their due date is in the future). Tap Undo on any that were a mistake.

bills grouped by before/after payday, with checkboxes + per-cycle override editor.
